name: source-folder closed-loop end-to-end completes within the 10-minute budget per the architecture target
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --end-to-end --measure-duration --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -qE 'duration_seconds=[0-9]+' out.txt && grep -q 'within_budget=true' out.txt && grep -q 'budget_seconds=600' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
